header: Everything you need to act on your data
subheadline: Powerful where it counts, simple everywhere else. Set up in an afternoon, not a quarter.

items.title: Live dashboards
items.description: Watch metrics update in real time and drill into any number with a single click.

items.title: Smart alerts
items.description: Get pinged in Slack the moment revenue dips or sign-ups spike past your threshold.

items.title: Self-serve reports
items.description: Let every team answer their own questions without filing a ticket to data.

items.title: Granular permissions
items.description: Share the right numbers with the right people and keep sensitive data locked down.

items.title: 150+ integrations
items.description: Connect your warehouse, CRM, and ad accounts in minutes with prebuilt connectors.

items.title: Version history
items.description: Roll back any dashboard or metric change and see exactly who edited what, when.
